name: 内容工厂-提示词子流程-网页版

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok:true, message:'Started', replication_id:$('标准化输入').item.json.replication_id, script_id:$('标准化输入').item.json.script_id, product_id:$('标准化输入').item.json.product_id } }}

visual_specs.camera: Medium shot, static, slightly high angle. The camera follows the cleaning motion across the sofa surface.
visual_specs.subject_action: A person is actively using a handheld steam cleaner on a grey fabric sofa. The device is moved back and forth, emitting a large, visible cloud of steam that envelops the cleaning area.
visual_specs.lighting_environment: Warm, even indoor lighting, characteristic of a modern living room. The background features the sofa and a textured wall.
visual_specs.auxiliary_elements: Abundant white steam, upbeat and light guitar background music, sequential on-screen text with a red background highlighting the product's function.

abstract_logic.narrative_role: Visual Hook & Problem/Solution Demonstration. Immediately showcases the product's power and primary function in a visually satisfying way to capture attention.
abstract_logic.universal_instruction: Begin with a dynamic medium shot demonstrating the [HERO_PRODUCT] in its primary use case. Visually emphasize its effectiveness (e.g., steam, scrubbing power). Use upbeat music and overlay text that clearly states what the product does.

visual_specs.camera: The shot widens slightly to a medium shot, framing the presenter from the waist up as she sits comfortably on the sofa.
visual_specs.subject_action: The presenter stops cleaning, turns to the camera, and speaks with an energetic and friendly expression. She holds and gestures with the steam cleaner while delivering her sales pitch.
visual_specs.lighting_environment: Consistent with the previous scene; warm indoor lighting.
visual_specs.auxiliary_elements: The product remains the central prop. The music continues. Sequential on-screen text with a red background reinforces the presenter's key talking points: benefits, discount offer, and a final call to action.

abstract_logic.narrative_role: Benefit Articulation & Call to Action. The presenter builds a personal connection, explains the value proposition (e.g., 'perfect for spring cleaning'), creates urgency with a special offer, and directs the viewer to the point of sale.
abstract_logic.universal_instruction: Transition to a friendly presenter who directly addresses the camera while holding the [HERO_PRODUCT]. The presenter should state a key benefit, announce a limited-time offer, and end with a clear Call to Action. Synchronize on-screen text with the speech to maximize message retention.
